Script.name: initGMCP
Script.script:
------------------------------------------------- -- Sagt gmcp, dass er alle Daten senden soll -- -------------------------------------------------
function initGMCP() if not gmpc_is_initialized then sendGMCP( [[Core.Supports.Set [ "MG.char 1", "MG.room 1", "comm.channel 1" ] ]]) deleteOldProfiles(7) gmcp_is_initialized = true end end

Script.name: load and save functions
Script.script:
------------------------------------------------- -- Put your Lua functions here. -- -- -- -- Note that you can also use external scripts -- -------------------------------------------------
function mload_csv(filename, fls) -- this function loads a csv file from the modules folder -- -- the name of the modul Mundron_Core is Mundron_Core.xml -- hence, getModuleDir("Mundron_Core") will yield the path with the moduls name -- without the last 17 charater, we get just the folder! return load_csv(getModulePath("Mundron_Core"):sub(1,-17)..filename..".csv", fls) end
function pload_csv(filename, fls) -- this function loads a csv file from the profiles folder -- return load_csv(getMudletHomeDir().."/"..filename..".csv", fls) end
function mload_tlines(filename) -- this function loads a text file from the modules folder -- -- the name of the modul Mundron_Core is Mundron_Core.xml -- hence, getModuleDir("Mundron_Core") will yield the path with the moduls name -- without the last 17 charater, we get just the folder! return load_tlines(getModulePath("Mundron_Core"):sub(1,-17)..filename..".txt") end
function pload_tlines(filename) -- this function loads a text file from the profiles folder -- return load_tlines(getMudletHomeDir().."/"..filename..".txt") end
function msave_csv(filename, lines, setting) -- this function saves a csv file from the modules folder -- -- the name of the modul Mundron_Core is Mundron_Core.xml -- hence, getModuleDir("Mundron_Core") will yield the path with the moduls name -- without the last 17 charater, we get just the folder! return save_csv(getModulePath("Mundron_Core"):sub(1,-17)..filename..".csv", lines, setting) end
function psave_csv(filename, lines, setting) -- this function saves a text file from the profiles folder -- return save_csv(getMudletHomeDir().."/"..filename..".csv", lines, setting) end
function msave_tlines(filename, lines) -- this function saves a text file from the modules folder -- -- the name of the modul Mundron_Core is Mundron_Core.xml -- hence, getModuleDir("Mundron_Core") will yield the path with the moduls name -- without the last 17 charater, we get just the folder! return save_tlines(getModulePath("Mundron_Core"):sub(1,-17)..filename..".txt", lines) end
function psave_tlines(filename, lines) -- this function saves a csv file from the profiles folder -- return save_tlines(getMudletHomeDir().."/"..filename..".txt", lines) end
function load_csv(path, fls) if path == nil then eprint("No filename given to load!") return end if file_exists(path) then -- fls = first line setting local index if fls then index = 0 else index = 1 end local lines = {} local temp local setting for sline in io.lines(path) do temp = {} for cell in (sline..";"):gmatch(".-;") do temp[#temp+1] = cell:gsub(";", "") end if index==0 then setting = temp else table.insert(lines, temp) end index = index+1 end if fls then return setting, lines else return lines end else return nil end end
function load_tlines(path) -- fls = first line setting if path == nil then eprint("No filename given to load!") return end if file_exists(path) then local lines = {} for sline in io.lines(path) do sline = sline:gsub("\r", "") table.insert(lines, sline) end return lines else return nil end end
function save_csv(path,lines,setting) -- delimiter is ; because , are used in descriptions if #lines == 0 and file_exists(path) then eprint("Versuch die Datei '"..path.."' leer zu ueberschreiben verhindert!") return end local f = io.open(path, "w+") local temp if setting then if type(setting)=='table' then temp="" for i=1,#setting-1 do temp = temp..setting[i]..";" end f:write(temp..setting[#setting], "\n") else f:write(setting, "\n") end end for k,v in ipairs(lines) do if type(v)=='table' then temp = "" for i=1,#v-1 do temp = temp..v[i]..";" end f:write(temp..v[#v].."\n") else f:write(v, "\n") end end f:close() end
function save_tlines(path,lines) if #lines == 0 and file_exists(path) then eprint("Versuch die Datei '"..path.."' leer zu ueberschreiben verhindert!") return end local f = io.open(path, "w+") for i,v in ipairs(lines) do f:write(v, "\n") end f:close() end
function file_exists(path) local f = io.open(path, "rb") if f then f:close() end return f ~= nil end

Script.name: color_communication
colored echo / print
Script.script:
------------------------------------------------- -- Here are three colored echos -- -- -- -------------------------------------------------
function wprint(text, reference) reference = reference or "" if reference:len()>0 then reference = " ("..reference..")" end echo("


") decho("<255,255,0:0,0,0>WARNUNG"..reference..": ") echo(text) echo("


") end
function eprint(text, reference) reference = reference or "" if reference:len()>0 then reference = " ("..reference..")" end echo("


") decho("<255,155,0:0,0,0>FEHLER"..reference..": ") echo(text) echo("


") end
function iprint(text, reference) reference = reference or "" if reference:len()>0 then reference = " ("..reference..")" end echo("


") decho("<120,170,255:0,0,0>INFO"..reference..": ") echo(text) echo("


") end
text_farben = {r="<255,0,0:0,0,0>", g="<0,255,0:0,0,0>", b="<0,0,255:0,0,0>", y="<255,255,0:0,0,0>", c="<0,255,255:0,0,0>", m="<255,0,255:0,0,0>"}
function print(text) if type(text)=="string" then decho(text) elseif type(text)=="table" then for i,t in ipairs(text) do if type(t)=="string" then decho(t) elseif type(t)=="table" then decho(text_farben[t[0]], t[1]) end end end end
function print_table(tab) local temp = {} for i=1,#tab do for j=1,#tab[i] do if temp[j] then table.insert(temp[j], tab[i][j]) else temp[j] = {tab[i][j]} end end end for i=1,#temp do for j=1,#temp[i] do decho(temp[i][j]) end echo("
") end end

Script.name: formatting text
Script.script:
------------------------------------------------- -- Put your Lua functions here. -- -- -- -- Note that you can also use external scripts -- -------------------------------------------------
function norm_length(strings, orientation, extra) local max_len = 0 if type(orientation)=="number" then if (not(orientation==-1)) and (not(orientation==1)) then eprint("Fehler bei der Formatierung: Orientierung muss -1 (rechtsbuendig) oder 1 (linksbuendig) sein.") return end else orientation=-1 end local len=0 for i,v in ipairs(strings) do if type(v)=="number" then v = tostring(v) strings[i] = v end len = #v for m in v:gmatch("<%d+,%d+,%d+:%d+,%d+,%d+>") do len = len - #m end if len>max_len then max_len = len end end extra = extra or 0 local temp for i=1,#strings do temp = "" len = #strings[i] for m in strings[i]:gmatch("<%d+,%d+,%d+:%d+,%d+,%d+>") do len = len - #m end for i=1,max_len-len+extra do temp = temp.." " end if orientation == -1 then strings[i] = strings[i]..temp else strings[i] = temp..strings[i] end end return strings end
function unlower(string) return string:sub(1,1):upper()..string:sub(2) end
function norm_table(tab, orientations, extras) if type(orientations)=="nil" then orientation={} for i=1,len(tab) do table.insert(orientation, -1) end elseif type(orientations)=="number" then local orient = orientations orientations={} for i=1,len(tab) do table.insert(orientations, orient) end end if type(extras)=="nil" then extras={} for i=1,len(tab) do table.insert(extras, 0) end elseif type(extras)=="number" then local extra = extras extras={} for i=1,len(tab) do table.insert(extras, extra) end end for i=1,len(tab) do tab[i] = norm_length(tab[i], orientations[i], extras[i]) end return tab end

Script.name: helpers
Script.script:
------------------------------------------------- -- Put your Lua functions here. -- -- -- -- Note that you can also use external scripts -- -------------------------------------------------
function len(obj) if type(obj)=="string" then return #obj elseif type(obj)=="table" then local result = 0 for _,_ in pairs(obj) do result = result+1 end return result else return 0 end end
function break_lines(text, length) length = length or 59 local result={""} local index=1 for s in text:gmatch("[^%s]+") do if len(result[index]..s)<length then if len(result[index])>0 then result[index] = result[index].." "..s else result[index] = s end else index = index + 1 table.insert(result, s) end end return result end
function structure(dict) if type(dict)=="table" then echo("

{") for k,v in pairs(dict) do echo(k..": "..type(v).."
") end echo("}

") else display(dict) end end
